# Bharat AI Innovation Conference & Exhibition 2026

> India's premier AI conference and exhibition, bringing together top leaders, researchers, startups, and enterprises across artificial intelligence, generative AI, large language models, and machine learning. Held at World Trade Center Mumbai on **10–11 December 2026**.

## Event facts

- **Event name:** Bharat AI Innovation Conference & Exhibition 2026
- **Dates:** 10–11 December 2026 (2 days)
- **Venue:** World Trade Center Mumbai, Cuffe Parade, Mumbai 400005, Maharashtra, India
- **Organizer:** Aegis Knowledge Trust
- **Contact:** info@bharataiinnovation.com | +91 89765 80367
- **Website:** https://bharataiinnovation.com/
- **Registration:** https://networking.bharataiinnovation.com/register
- **Format:** In-person (offline)
- **Language:** English

## What it is

Bharat AI Innovation 2026 is a two-day conference and exhibition covering Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), enterprise AI deployment, AI governance and ethics, AI startups, AI for industry verticals (BFSI, healthcare, manufacturing, retail, agriculture, government), AI talent and skills, deep learning research, and the Indian AI ecosystem. It includes 10+ conference tracks across 5 halls, an exhibition floor with 132 booths across 977 sqm and 8 industry zones, a startup pitch competition, and AI/ML training workshops.

## Pass types and pricing (INR)

- **Visitor Pass** — FREE (exhibition access)
- **Academic Pass** — ₹999 (students/faculty with valid ID)
- **Delegate Pass** — ₹4,999 (full conference + exhibition)
- **VIP Pass** — ₹14,999 (premium seating, networking dinner, lounge access)
- **Media Pass** — By Invite
- **Team packages:** Team 5–9, Enterprise 10–19, Corporate 20+

## Exhibition booth packages

- **Startup Pod** — ₹35,000
- **Explorer** — ₹84,000
- **Innovator** — ₹92,400
- **Accelerator** — ₹1,56,000
- **Enterprise** — ₹2,20,000
- **Flagship** — ₹6,24,000
- **Mega** — ₹15,00,000

## Confirmed speakers

- **Shri. K.K. Singh** — Joint Secretary, Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology (MeitY), Government of India
- **Dr. Ashish Tendulkar** — Lead AI, Google
- **Shailesh Dhuri** — CEO, Decimal Point Analytics
- **Rajesh Dhuddu, PhD** — Partner & Emerging Tech Leader, PwC
- **Bhupesh Daheria** — CEO, Aegis School of Data Science & Artificial Intelligence

## Pages

- [Home](https://bharataiinnovation.com/index.html): Event overview, dates, speakers, registration
- [About](https://bharataiinnovation.com/about.html): About the event and Aegis Knowledge Trust
- [Conference](https://bharataiinnovation.com/conference.html): 10+ tracks, schedule across 5 halls, 2 days
- [Exhibition](https://bharataiinnovation.com/exhibition.html): 132 booths, 8 industry zones, booth packages
- [Startup Pitch](https://bharataiinnovation.com/startup-pitch.html): Startup pitch competition for AI startups
- [Training & Workshop](https://bharataiinnovation.com/training-workshop.html): AI/ML hands-on training workshops
- [Partner](https://bharataiinnovation.com/partner.html): Sponsorship and partnership tiers
- [Accommodation](https://bharataiinnovation.com/accommodation.html): Premium hotels near WTC Mumbai
- [Register](https://networking.bharataiinnovation.com/register): Conference registration
- [Contact](https://networking.bharataiinnovation.com/contact): Contact form and event team

## Key topics

Generative AI, LLMs, ChatGPT, GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, RAG, AI agents, multimodal AI, foundation models, AI governance, AI ethics, responsible AI, AI policy India, AI for BFSI, AI for healthcare, AI for manufacturing, AI for agriculture, AI for retail, MLOps, AI infrastructure, GPU compute, AI startups India, AI funding, AI talent, AI skilling, deep learning, computer vision, NLP, India AI Mission, IndiaAI, sovereign AI, Bharat AI ecosystem.

## Why attend

- Meet senior policymakers including representatives from MeitY and IndiaAI Mission
- Network with 5,000+ AI professionals, founders, researchers, and enterprise leaders
- See live demos from 132 exhibitors across 8 AI industry zones
- Attend deep-dive technical workshops on GenAI, LLMs, MLOps, and AI deployment
- Connect with venture capital and angel investors in the startup pitch arena
- Establish partnerships across India's growing AI ecosystem
